"; // Replace the URL with the new one $str = str_replace("http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", "http://yahoo.com/abc1", $str); // Output the modified string echo $str; ?> This code replaces the URL `http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1` with `http://yahoo.com/abc1` in the string.
